name: claude
description: Use Claude from Codex to review code or delegate rescue tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Run Claude reviews and rescue tasks from Codex
interface.longDescription: Claude lets Codex call the local Claude Code CLI for read-only reviews, repeat-until-pass adversarial reviews, rescue tasks, background jobs, status checks, result retrieval, and cancellation.
defaultPrompt: Run $claude:adversarial-review, fix findings, and repeat until pass.
Ask Claude to investigate this bug.
